user_profile.occupation: senior UX researcher at a healthcare software company
user_profile.living_situation: rents a small two-bedroom apartment with her partner Tom near Strijp-S
personality_notes: good at helping other people organize things while avoiding her own paperwork
oscillates between hyper-structured planning and weeks of avoidance
socially warm in small groups but increasingly reluctant to answer messages
keeps detailed notes in Notion but rarely revisits them
often frames purchases as 'investments' even when stressed about money
recurring_routines: tries to go swimming Tuesday mornings before work but averages twice a month
video calls her father on Sundays unless she is traveling or emotionally drained
orders groceries online late Sunday evening and forgets at least one item nearly every week
keeps restarting a sleep tracking habit with different apps
rotates between making elaborate meal plans and surviving on toast and yogurt

entities.name: Tom Janssen
notes: software engineer working mostly remote
handles most landlord communication because Maya procrastinates
wants to buy an apartment within 2 years
occasionally frustrated by Maya's unfinished projects but avoids direct confrontation
close friends with Daan from university

entities.name: Eva de Vries
notes: lives in Utrecht
frequently borrows money and repays late
works intermittently as a freelance photographer
Maya feels protective but resentful
had a falling out with their father in 2023

entities.name: Hans de Vries
notes: retired electrician living in Breda
recovering from knee surgery since late 2024
keeps offering to help fix things in Maya's apartment despite mobility issues
does not fully understand Maya's work but asks about it anyway
sometimes forgets details from previous conversations

entities.name: Lina Mourad
notes: product manager on Maya's team
encouraged Maya to apply for promotion in 2024
frequently travels for work
shared budgeting spreadsheet with Maya during a financially anxious period
Tom thinks Lina overworks herself

entities.name: Daan Peters
notes: runs a small cycling repair shop
helped Maya buy a secondhand bike in 2022
still waiting for Maya to repay part of a group Airbnb deposit from a Portugal trip
occasionally cat-sits Miso

entities.name: Jules
notes: therapy ended in early 2024 due to insurance coverage confusion
Maya intended to resume sessions with a different provider but never completed intake forms
frequently referenced in old journal notes

entities.name: Anika
notes: lives downstairs
often receives packages for Maya and Tom
mild tension over noise from Tom's late-night gaming sessions
lent Maya a drill in February 2025 and never explicitly asked for it back

entities.name: Ruben
notes: praised Maya's facilitation skills but criticized missed follow-ups
changed companies in March 2026
his departure disrupted several long-term projects
Maya had considered asking him for a recommendation letter

entities.name: Sophie
notes: moved to Copenhagen in 2023
sends intermittent voice messages instead of texting
Maya repeatedly postpones visiting her
once co-hosted a failed podcast idea with Maya during lockdown

entities.name: Bram
notes: treated Maya's recurring shoulder and neck pain
recommended strength exercises Maya rarely maintains longer than 3 weeks
clinic changed scheduling software in 2025 causing repeated booking confusion

entities.name: Mira
notes: left the company after burnout in mid-2024
Maya quietly worries about following a similar path
still occasionally sends memes to the old team Slack channel

entities.name: Nora
notes: reminded Maya multiple times to wear her night guard
Maya lost one night guard during a trip to Berlin
follow-up cavity treatment delayed twice due to rescheduling

entities.name: Karel
notes: slow to respond about mold near bedroom window
raised rent in January 2026
still has not reimbursed the plumbing expense Tom paid upfront

entities.name: Yuki
notes: lives in Osaka
mostly chats with Maya late at night during stress periods
encouraged her to start digital illustration again
Tom has never met Yuki but knows about them

events.description: Maya informally discussed a lead researcher role with Ruben but said she wanted to 'wait until life feels less chaotic'.
Lina encouraged Maya to document achievements because she tends to minimize her own work.
Maya started a promotion evidence document in Notion and abandoned it after three entries.
Received strong performance feedback but criticism about delayed stakeholder emails.
Ruben left unexpectedly. Maya felt both relieved and destabilized.
Still telling people she plans to apply for advancement later in the year.
Tom began talking seriously about buying an apartment.
Maya created a spreadsheet comparing mortgage scenarios but stopped updating it after interest rates shifted.
Landlord increased rent unexpectedly.
Mold near bedroom window worsened during winter.
Viewed two apartments in Eindhoven but backed out after calculating renovation costs.
Tom reopened discussions after another plumbing issue.
First physiotherapy referral for shoulder pain linked to desk work.
Began tracking headaches and caffeine intake inconsistently.
Started swimming regularly for about six weeks.
Stopped physiotherapy exercises during a busy product launch.
Jaw pain worsened after losing night guard on Berlin trip.
Promised Tom she would finally schedule ADHD assessment paperwork but delayed due to anxiety.
Restarted symptom tracking in a different app after seeing Mira post about burnout recovery.
Eva borrowed money for camera repairs and repaid only half for several months.
Hans had an argument with Eva about finances and stopped speaking to her briefly.
Hans underwent knee surgery. Maya visited Breda more often afterward.
Maya quietly covered a utility bill for Eva without telling Tom immediately.
Christmas planning became tense because Eva did not want to stay overnight at Hans's house.
Started a podcast with Sophie during lockdown; ended after five episodes.
Bought an iPad for illustration practice justified as both hobby and work tool.
Joined an online illustration challenge and stopped after day 9.
Told Yuki she wanted to open a small online print shop.
Spent several weekends redesigning a portfolio website instead of applying for jobs.
Has not drawn much in months but still watches productivity videos about art routines.

projects.name: Tax reimbursement dispute
details: Maya believes she is owed reimbursement for remote work expenses
missing one receipt from a monitor purchase
keeps moving the email draft into different reminder systems
Tom offered to help but Maya said she would handle it herself

projects.name: Bedroom mold documentation
details: photos stored in a shared Google Drive folder
Karel requested humidity measurements Maya forgot to record consistently
Tom bought a dehumidifier during a sale
Maya worries complaining too aggressively could affect lease renewal

projects.name: Portugal trip photo album
details: shared with Daan and Lina
Maya imported all photos into Lightroom but never curated them
still occasionally mentioned jokingly in group chat

projects.name: ADHD assessment intake
details: downloaded forms twice
one clinic waitlist expired after no response
Maya alternates between feeling certain and dismissing the idea entirely
Lina thinks diagnosis could help with work stress

projects.name: Kitchen shelf installation
details: using borrowed drill from Anika
one shelf mounted unevenly
Tom wanted to hire someone but Maya insisted it was easy
paint patch samples still visible near the wall anchors

projects.name: Sleep improvement experiment
details: cycles through melatonin, magnesium, herbal tea, and strict bedtime rules
often breaks routines during stressful work periods
late-night Discord chats with Yuki correlate with worse sleep
owns three different alarm clocks

latent_facts.fact: Maya often claims money is too tight for travel while continuing several overlapping subscriptions she barely uses.
Tom increasingly worries that Maya's stress manifests as procrastination rather than visible emotional breakdowns.
Maya associates unanswered emails with shame and tends to avoid inboxes after missing one important reply.
The same black notebook contains work interview notes, grocery lists, therapy reflections, and measurements for the kitchen shelves.
She repeatedly tells herself she performs better under pressure even though her best work periods historically followed stable routines.
Maya quietly avoids visiting Breda for too long because being around her father's aging makes her anxious.
Miso's veterinary reminders are often the only appointments Maya schedules immediately.
The unfinished podcast still exists online and occasionally resurfaces when old acquaintances mention it.
Maya once considered leaving healthcare tech entirely for illustration work but never told coworkers.
Several people in Maya's life independently think she is close to burnout, but she interprets concern as exaggeration.
